phase_name: Real-mode pipeline + cup transformation fix (cross-repo session)
context_summary: Cross-repo session continuing from prior pause. Built out Real Test tab in vla_SO-ARM101's control_gui.py with cached lego + cup poses, fixed cup pose transformation bug (Y-sign + missing marker→object orientation rotation), implemented marker_geometry.py with cylinder_side_marker function in aruco_camera_localizer. Cups now appear UPRIGHT in MoveIt planning scene (verified via /get_planning_scene). Remaining ~25-30mm xy/z position residual + ~6° orientation residual are pure PnP/camera-side errors, separate calibration task.

completed_tasks.name: Real Test tab scaffold (Setup + Calibration + Run sections)
Wipe-then-push pattern for both refresh threads (idempotent ApplyPlanningScene)
Clear all caches button (cache + collisions + visual markers + status labels)
Run Real Pick & Drop loop iterating cached legos with cached cup poses
_build_lego_geometry (mesh-or-box dispatch, no size inference from color)
Per-robot YOLOE config in robot_config.yaml (prompts, prompt_map, confidence)
aruco_config.json marker_to_object schema (method+params, position_offset legacy fallback)
localize_aruco function dispatch + marker→object orientation rotation in published drop_quat
Cup orientation verified upright in MoveIt planning scene via /get_planning_scene

remaining_tasks.name: Diagnose ~25-30mm PnP/camera position residual (USD camera VFOV mismatch? distortion? PnP solve ambiguity?)
Diagnose ~6° orientation residual (camera intrinsics or marker pose noise?)
Implement 'map cups sweep' workflow — rotate-extent scan, log yaw at each detection, revisit + cache permanently
End-to-end Run Real Pick & Drop motion test (currently un-exercised; pre-flight gates work)
Pre-existing uncommitted state in isaac-sim-mcp (.planning/ROADMAP, STATE, extension.py, etc.) — separate commit cycle

human_actions_pending.action: If cv2 preview windows desired, relaunch aruco/yoloe from your own terminal
human_actions_pending.context: Currently running headless from this session's Bash subshell. Bash subshells lack reliable D-bus/XDG context for cv2.imshow per CLAUDE.md. To get preview windows, run scripts/restart_aruco_localizer.sh and scripts/restart_yoloe.sh from your own terminal.

decisions.decision: marker→object transformation lives in aruco_camera_localizer config + function, NOT control_gui or sim publisher
decisions.rationale: User constraint: 'input to VLA package has to be the same in sim and real, the transformation of aruco to cup center happens in the config of the aruco camera localizer'. Config now declares geometry method+params; marker_geometry.py computes both offset AND orientation.

decisions.decision: cylinder_side_marker function returns both offset AND orientation_quat_marker_to_object
decisions.rationale: Position-only fix would still leave cups visually wrong in planning scene (lying on side instead of upright). Orientation rotation is essential for mesh collision objects to render correctly.

decisions.decision: R_marker_to_object derived empirically (R_marker_world.inv() * R_object_known) not from first-principles geometric reasoning
decisions.rationale: ArUco PnP labels marker frame axes in a specific way (Y=right, X=up vs my initial Z=face/Y=up assumption). First geometric guess produced wrong result; empirical derivation from one captured marker quat + known object quat is gold standard.

decisions.decision: marker_to_object schema is forward-compatible (method registry) with legacy position_offset fallback for jetank backward compat
decisions.rationale: Adding box_top_marker / sphere_pole_marker / etc. requires only a function addition + config edit, no call-site changes. Jetank rows continue to work without migration.

decisions.decision: Y-sign was wrong in original aruco_config.json (Y=-0.005 should have been Y=+0.005)
decisions.rationale: Comment claimed '-Y in marker frame = up on cup' (assumed image-Y-down convention), but ArUco PnP outputs marker frame with Y up on cup pattern. Function with marker_y_axis='up' produces correct +0.00483 automatically.

decisions.decision: wipe-then-push pattern (REMOVE + 500ms wait + ADD) for cup/lego refreshes mirroring _cmd_grasp_refresh
decisions.rationale: MoveIt's ApplyPlanningScene ADD-on-existing-id is not idempotent — repeat refreshes silently fail without prior REMOVE. Diagnosed via systematic comparison of working sim refresh vs broken real refresh code paths.

decisions.decision: _lookup_bbox 3-tier fallback (exact, color-only, color-prefix) handles both /objects_bbox_sim and /objects_bbox_real
decisions.rationale: Sim catalog publishes size-specific keys (red_2x4); YOLOE catalog publishes color-prefix keys. Tier-3 (any key starting with color_) makes lookup catalog-agnostic without branching on Sim/Real Hardware toggle.

decisions.decision: _build_lego_geometry: mesh-by-size if known, else SolidPrimitive.BOX with bbox catalog dims — NO color→size inference
decisions.rationale: User explicit constraint: 'in real world the injection pipeline cant know what size it is'. Vision detects color but not size. SolidPrimitive.BOX from bbox catalog is the size-agnostic geometry; catalog values can be edited per real cup setup.

decisions.decision: drop_point wrist_roll changed from sign*(-pi/2) to sign*(+pi/2)
decisions.rationale: User found cup ArUco markers were not visible at scan pose with default wrist_roll=-90°. Sign convention flipped so default +1 sign now produces +90° (markers in FOV). Drop sweep stays at -pi/2 unchanged (different motion phase, jaw-clearing not scanning).

isaac-sim-mcp: mobileclip_blt.ts (?? large model artifact, gitignore candidate, do NOT commit as-is)

next_action: Either (a) diagnose the residual ~25-30mm xy/z position error in the real pipeline (USD camera VFOV mismatch is a leading suspect: rendered VFOV=75° vs robot_config.yaml's 67.7°), or (b) implement the 'map cups sweep' workflow user described (rotate-extent scan, log yaw on detection, revisit + cache permanently for robust real-world cup localization), or (c) run end-to-end real pick-drop motion test now that all caches and orientation are correct.
context_notes: User's mental model: real-mode mocks real-world workflow. Cameras can't see everything always — must scan-then-cache. The Real Test tab is the testing surface; eventually refactor the working flows into existing UI sections. The marker_to_object schema in aruco_config.json should hold any future cup/marker geometry — adding new objects is a function + config addition, not hand-tuned offsets.

live_infrastructure.isaac_sim: Running. Scene built via quick_start. Wrist + workspace cameras publishing.
live_infrastructure.control_stack: Running — /so_arm101_control_gui, MoveIt, RViz, all services up. Real Test tab visible.
live_infrastructure.localize_yoloe: Running headless (background, launched from this Bash subshell). Config-driven prompts: red/blue/green object → mapped to red/blue/green child_frame_ids.
live_infrastructure.localize_aruco: Running headless (PID 1074948+, launched from this Bash subshell). Now uses marker_to_object schema → applies orientation rotation; published cups upright in world frame.
live_infrastructure.moveit_planning_scene: Contains ground_plane + 3 cup_drop_* meshes (UPRIGHT) + 5 lego_*_N boxes (when Refresh Legos was last run). Verified via /get_planning_scene — cup euler ≈ (0, +6, +90)° matches sim's (0, 0, +90)° within PnP noise.

anti_patterns_discovered.pattern: Trusting first-principles geometric reasoning over empirical derivation for marker frame conventions
anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: First R_marker_to_object matrix was geometrically logical but produced cup tilted 96° from upright. Empirical R = R_marker_world.inv() * R_object_known produced the correct matrix on first try.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: When marker frame axis convention is unclear, derive R_m_to_obj empirically from one captured marker quat + known object quat. Document the empirical derivation method in marker_geometry.py.

anti_patterns_discovered.pattern: MoveIt ApplyPlanningScene ADD-on-existing-id is not idempotent
anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: First refresh after clear-cache succeeded; second refresh silently failed (no log). Spent multiple cycles debugging until comparing with sim's working _cmd_grasp_refresh which uses wipe-then-push pattern.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: ANY scene-mutation flow that may be called more than once on the same id MUST do REMOVE + 500ms wait + ADD. Just calling ADD twice silently no-ops or returns false-success. Mirror _cmd_grasp_refresh's pattern.

anti_patterns_discovered.pattern: stdout from threaded apply closures is buffered; success log lines may not appear immediately
anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: Applied changes that appeared 'silent' for tens of seconds, leading to false-negative diagnosis. Direct /get_planning_scene query is the source-of-truth for verifying scene state.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: For verifying MoveIt scene mutations: query /get_planning_scene service directly with WORLD_OBJECT_NAMES|WORLD_OBJECT_GEOMETRY components. Do NOT rely on RViz visual or log lines.

anti_patterns_discovered.pattern: stale config holders (config loaded once at process start) require restart, not just file edit
anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: Edited bbox_catalog.json with new color-prefix keys; localize_yoloe was already running and held stale catalog in memory; control_gui kept seeing old keys; legos silently failed to reach planning scene. Spent multiple cycles diagnosing until restarting yoloe.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: When editing config files that consumer processes load at startup (not via topic subscription), restart the consumer to pick up changes. Verify via topic echo of the published config (/objects_bbox_real) before assuming runtime state matches the file.
